Seo.homeTitle: bloot — Your vault, before anyone else gets it.
Seo.homeDescription: Save images and videos from any website to your local library with one click. Organize inspiration privately with qooti by bloot on Windows, macOS, and Chrome.
Seo.downloadTitle: Download qooti for Windows & macOS — bloot
Seo.downloadDescription: Get the qooti desktop app by bloot in under a minute—Apple Silicon, Intel, and Windows 10+. Then grab the Chrome extension and start saving inspiration locally.
Seo.pricingTitle: qooti pricing & plans in UZS — bloot
Seo.pricingDescription: Compare qooti subscription plans in UZS on bloot: monthly, six months, or yearly. Unlock every feature, priority support, and the best per-month price on longer plans.
Seo.helpDescription: Install qooti on macOS or Windows, use the Chrome extension, purchase a plan, and read legal policies—all in one bloot help hub with Telegram support.
Seo.termsDescription: Read the official terms for qooti by bloot: acceptable use, subscriptions, liability, and how our visual inspiration software and services work.
Seo.privacyDescription: Understand how bloot handles data for qooti: what we collect, how we use it, retention, and your choices—written clearly for creatives who care about privacy.
Seo.thankYouDescription: Your qooti download should start shortly. If it doesn’t, use the manual link—then watch the install video or message bloot support on Telegram for help.
Seo.loginDescription: Sign in to your bloot account to manage qooti apps, billing, and settings. Private page—not intended for search indexing.
Seo.signupDescription: Sign up for bloot to activate qooti and manage your subscription. Private page—not intended for search indexing.
Seo.registerDescription: Create a bloot account to use qooti. Private page—not intended for search indexing.
Seo.forgotPasswordDescription: Request a secure code to reset your bloot password. Private page—not intended for search indexing.
Seo.dashboardDescription: Signed-in bloot account area for qooti apps and billing. Private page—not intended for search indexing.

Home.metaTitle: bloot — Your vault, before anyone else gets it.
Home.heroP: Save images and videos from anywhere on the web. Organize your inspiration. Locally, privately, instantly.
Home.heroMeta: Windows & macOS · No account required to get started
Home.dlSub: Available for macOS and Windows. No account required to get started.
Home.pricingTitle: Choose what works best for you.
Home.pricingSub: The longer period you choose, the more discount you get.
Home.footerTag: Your vault for visual inspiration. Built for creatives who move fast.
